title: Privacy as a product, not a penalty
subtitle: SARAL turns DPDP compliance into a competitive advantage — legal safety, business growth, user trust, at once.

pillars.d: Zero bundled consent · verifiable ledger · parental gateway · audit-ready <2 min
Core onboarding unblocked · opt-in recovered via JIT · premium trust positioning
Plain-language multilingual notices · one-tap revocation · transparent usage

decision_ask: Approve today: (1) 2 senior backend eng + 1 designer + 1 legal PM for 12 weeks; (2) ₹45 lakh for translation, audit & managed infra; (3) Go for Phase-1 A/B on 20 July 2026.

next_steps.a: PRD for Consent Ledger + JIT trigger logic

closing: DPDP isn't a deadline to fear — it's a blueprint for the most trusted food-tech platform in India. Our users' data belongs to them; their trust belongs to us.
notes: End with energy. The ask is specific: people, money, a date. Privacy is not a cost center — it is the product.
